Operation 'solveTSP' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary uses technical jargon (TSP) without explaining the practical action. Description lacks critical details about inputs (list of locations), outputs (optimized sequence, metrics), and computational characteristics. Enhanced version clarifies the action, specifies input format, details return values including route sequence and metrics, and notes the computational nature for AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Optimizes visit order for multiple locations (route planning).
data.summary_suggestion: Optimize route order for multiple locations
data.description_suggestion: Solves the Travelling Salesman Problem (TSP) to find the optimal visit order for multiple locations, minimizing total distance or travel time. Accepts a list of waypoints/locations as input. Returns an optimized route sequence with calculated metrics (total distance, estimated time, waypoint order). This is a computationally intensive operation suitable for route planning and logistics optimization.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses technical jargon (TSP) without explaining the practical action. Description lacks critical details about inputs (list of locations), outputs (optimized sequence, metrics), and computational characteristics. Enhanced version clarifies the action, specifies input format, details return values including route sequence and metrics, and notes the computational nature for AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getAreaInfo' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is appropriately concise and action-oriented. Description is too vague about inputs and incomplete about outputs. The phrase 'such as building count' suggests there are other metrics but doesn't specify them. Enhanced description clarifies input requirements (polygon definition), expands output details (metrics, statistics, metadata), and provides context for when AI agents should use this operation (geographic analysis, urban planning).

data.current_description: Returns information about the given area polygon, such as building count.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specified area polygon, including metrics such as building count, area dimensions, and other geographic statistics. Requires an area polygon definition as input (typically via coordinates or area identifier). Returns comprehensive area metadata and statistics. Useful for geographic analysis, urban planning queries, and area-based data retrieval.
data.reasoning: Summary is appropriately concise and action-oriented. Description is too vague about inputs and incomplete about outputs. The phrase 'such as building count' suggests there are other metrics but doesn't specify them. Enhanced description clarifies input requirements (polygon definition), expands output details (metrics, statistics, metadata), and provides context for when AI agents should use this operation (geographic analysis, urban planning).
